description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a carved face featuring two large, irregular eye holes and a wide, slightly lopsided mouth, giving it a whimsical and slightly spooky expression. The pumpkin's surface is ribbed and matte, with a natural, slightly rough texture typical of real pumpkins. A thick, brown stem protrudes from the top, adding to its realistic appearance. The carving is traditional, resembling a classic jack-o'-lantern style, and the interior appears hollowed out, as evidenced by the cutouts. The pumpkin sits on a flat, slightly spread base, possibly from the carving process or natural settling. No additional decorative accessories are visible, and the pumpkin is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a whimsical face and a brown stem, featuring a ribbed, matte surface and hollow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with two large eye holes and a wide, lopsided mouth, as well as the prominent stem.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the carving and the smooth, uncarved surface wrapping around the pumpkin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, ribbed surface and the full curvature of the pumpkin, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the transition from the carved face to the uncarved back, highlighting the pumpkin's roundness and stem.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two large, irregular eye holes and a wide, lopsided mouth. The features are cut through the pumpkin, creating open spaces and a whimsical, slightly spooky expression.
